events.name: GW150914
events.description: First direct detection of gravitational waves. Two black holes merged 1.3 billion years ago, releasing energy equivalent to 3 solar masses as gravitational waves. Nobel Prize 2017.
events.citation: Abbott, B. P., et al. (2016). Observation of Gravitational Waves from a Binary Black Hole Merger. Physical Review Letters, 116(6), 061102.

events.name: GW170817
events.description: First gravitational wave from neutron star merger with electromagnetic counterpart (kilonova). Source of heavy elements like gold and platinum.
events.citation: Abbott, B. P., et al. (2017). GW170817: Observation of Gravitational Waves from a Binary Neutron Star Inspiral. Physical Review Letters, 119(16), 161101.
